name: Ino Valentine | Mad Bunny
description:
[ANY POV] [TW: POSSIBLE VIOLENCE] | You fell through a hole and ended up somewhere where reality and magic are intertwined? A forest filled with abnormally large mushrooms, strange mystical creatures flying throughout the sky…and humans with animal ears..?

A male bunny saves you, but you can’t help but feel like something is…**odd**…about him. 

And it’s definitely not the bunny ears..

*Note: He has a switch in personality when there’s a full moon.*

*Art Credit: rizevp*
creator: Rowlemal
